violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found at 50ppm Chlorine solution. *Maintain at 100ppm Chlorine.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Black debris along bottom edge of intererior panel of ice machine.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Dirty dishes in hand sink basin. *COS-Moved to wash sink while on-site.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Employee food items were stored commingling with food service items in back room refrigerator.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found at less than 100ppm Chlorine with wet cloth out of solution on side of bucket. *COS to 100ppm Chlorine.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Interior panel of ice machine has a build up of black debris along bottom edge.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishes sanitizer solution found at less than 150ppm Quat. *COS to 300ppm. *Ensure dishes stay in solution for 60 seconds for proper contact time according to chemical instructions.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Dirty dish in hand sink basin. -Observed personal water bottle filled at hand sink faucet.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
